markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare Kyle for client presentations by reviewing GrowthX's sales process and demo materials.](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - Kyle needs to familiarize himself with GrowthX's demo environment, including login access to <team@growthx.ai> and various presentation materials
  - [The content OS demo (using Abnormal Security as an example) is a key selling point, showcasing GrowthX's ability to generate and cluster content ideas efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Marcel introduced a new "prospect memos" feature in Notion for sharing tailored thoughts and ideas with potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [The team plans to refine their slide deck to create a more generic, logo-rich story highlighting client growth successes](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Demo Environment Setup

  - Kyle should log into <team@growthx.ai> email for access to temporal workflow demos
  - [Two-factor authentication may be required through 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [External slides and webinar materials should be readily available for reference](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Consider forking the external slide deck to build a comprehensive library](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Content OS Demonstration

  - [Abnormal Security's content OS is currently the cleanest example to show](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Highlights include:](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Generation of 1000+ content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Clear clustering of ideas](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Execution against selected clusters](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Ramp's content OS was recently redone but lacks some fields and appears messier](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Client Collaboration Showcase

  - [Use Notion to display the "First 12 Weeks" process](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Highlight weekly metric updates (Galileo used as a good example)](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Demonstrate Slack integration to show real-time collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Prospect Memos

  - [New feature in Notion for creating externally shareable pages](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Used for sending tailored thoughts and ideas to prospects](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Can be automated in the future to provide high-level overviews](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Column A Presentation

  - [Includes researched context about the prospect](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Features a simple article and a more edgy, attention-grabbing piece](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [New section on inspiration sources for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Outlines the evolution from initial strategy to fully developed content OS](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Success Stories

  - [Tiro highlighted as a great example for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Zoopla mentioned as another good case study to showcase](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Need to develop a comprehensive logo slide showing client growth stories](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to familiarize himself with all demo materials and login processes](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel and Kyle to collaborate on redoing slides for a more generic, logo-rich story](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Kyle to start working on new slide ideas this week](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Team to develop a strong logo slide showcasing client growth successes](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Marcel to be less available on Slack today; Kyle to use WhatsApp for urgent matters](https://fathom.video/share/TpFR2iy2gmx5hxJynzmyZxmwx2mJ5zLw?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
